<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "4, ['Explanation of mandatory freelancer insurance compliance requirements in Germany (legal context, KSK pension contributions, deadlines)', 'Request to outline or enable automated compliance/payment setup for international coverage continuity', 'Reference to Künstlersozialkasse (KSK) registration and contribution matching requirements (outside insurance plan fields)', 'Offering to prepare activation documents and initiate secure payment setup instructions (action not covered by any template field)']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "13, ['Description of health insurance coverage options with costs, deductibles, and coverage limits', 'Inclusion of mental health coverage and stress management programs', 'Inclusion of travel insurance with global coverage and emergency evacuation', 'Inclusion of property/equipment insurance coverage for electronics and studio gear', 'Coverage tiers (standard, premium) and quality ratings implied by plan type', 'Deductible amounts and coverage limits per plan', 'Availability of wellness and gym reimbursement features', 'Telemedicine availability and crisis support', 'Emergency coordination and global assistance features', 'Immediate coverage activation timelines and processing times', 'Policy decision or enrollment deadlines such as March 31, 2024', 'Compliance with German freelancer and EU mobility standards (maps to coverage_location and regulatory attributes)', 'Comparison and bundling of insurance types (health, travel, property) within an integrated proposal presentation']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 4, ['Explanation of mandatory freelancer insurance compliance requirements in Germany (legal context, KSK pension contributions, deadlines)', 'Request to outline or enable automated compliance/payment setup for international coverage continuity', 'Reference to Künstlersozialkasse (KSK) registration and contribution matching requirements (outside insurance plan fields)', 'Offering to prepare activation documents and initiate secure payment setup instructions (action not covered by any template field)']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 13, ['Description of health insurance coverage options with costs, deductibles, and coverage limits', 'Inclusion of mental health coverage and stress management programs', 'Inclusion of travel insurance with global coverage and emergency evacuation', 'Inclusion of property/equipment insurance coverage for electronics and studio gear', 'Coverage tiers (standard, premium) and quality ratings implied by plan type', 'Deductible amounts and coverage limits per plan', 'Availability of wellness and gym reimbursement features', 'Telemedicine availability and crisis support', 'Emergency coordination and global assistance features', 'Immediate coverage activation timelines and processing times', 'Policy decision or enrollment deadlines such as March 31, 2024', 'Compliance with German freelancer and EU mobility standards (maps to coverage_location and regulatory attributes)', 'Comparison and bundling of insurance types (health, travel, property) within an integrated proposal presentation']
